title: Fees & Funding
intro: Our classes are subsidised through the Ministry of Education's Out-of-Hours Music and Arts Programme, keeping costs accessible for all families.

fee_box.label: Annual Tuition Fee
fee_box.period: per student, per year (all four terms)
items: One instrument class per week (30 mins)
All term dates included in the fee
Choir and ensemble are free — no extra charge
Subsidised by the Ministry of Education
Managed via ClubHub for easy payments

notes.heading: Subsidised programme
notes.body: Gallery Music Centre is part of the Ministry of Education's out-of-hours music and arts programme. This means classes are kept at a very low cost compared to private music tuition.

notes.heading: Enrolling and start dates
notes.body: Enrolments for new and returning students open in term 4 for the following year. All classes start at the beginning of the school year. There may be some places available for music basics and the choir during the year.

notes.heading: Waitlists
notes.body: Some of our classes can have waitlists - we recommend getting in touch early.

notes.heading: Payments
notes.body: Fees are managed through ClubHub. Please keep your details up to date and use ClubHub to manage your family contributions.
